design_philosophy.identity: Suite Essentials - High-end, premium wholesale B2B hotel supplies.
core_principles: Use heavy negative space (generous padding) to create a premium feel.
Asymmetric bento grids for visual tension in product categories.
Cinematic lighting and dark theme with warm taupe and bronze accents.
Typography is the primary decorative element; avoid unnecessary graphics.

headings.usage: Use for all H1, H2, H3. Apply tracking-tight for large headings.

body.usage: Use for paragraphs, buttons, navigation, and labels. Apply tracking-wide for overlines.

bento_grid.description: Use the Tetris Grid mode. Mix col-span-4, col-span-8, and row-spans to create an asymmetric, artful presentation of the 7 product categories.

surfaces.card: bg-[#1A1617] border border-[#5A4A4E]/30 rounded-none p-8 transition-colors duration-300 hover:border-[#8C7A6B]/50

buttons.primary: bg-[#5A4A4E] text-[#F5F2F0] hover:bg-[#705E63] px-8 py-4 rounded-none transition-all duration-300 font-medium tracking-wide
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-[#F5F2F0] border border-[#5A4A4E] hover:border-[#8C7A6B] hover:bg-[#1A1617] px-8 py-4 rounded-none transition-all duration-300 font-medium tracking-wide

forms.input: bg-[#1A1617] border border-[#5A4A4E]/50 focus:border-[#8C7A6B] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#8C7A6B] rounded-none text-[#F5F2F0] p-4 w-full placeholder-[#8A817C] transition-colors
forms.label: text-sm text-[#B8B0AA] mb-2 block font-medium

icons.style: Always use strokeWidth={1} for an elegant, delicate appearance.

logo.description: Suite Essentials logo with SE monogram and botanical leaf elements.

image_treatment.card_overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-[#0A0A0A]/80 to-transparent opacity-80 group-hover:opacity-60 transition-opacity duration-300

testing.attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) MUST include data-testid attributes formatted in kebab-case representing their role.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and setup the required fonts: Playfair Display and Outfit via standard Google Fonts imports in index.css.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Playfair Display must be applied to all H1/H2/H3 elements.
Implement the 'Tetris' grid for the 'Featured Categories' on the Home page using the specified images.
Keep forms minimal and elegant. Do not use border-radius (rounded-none) to maintain the premium, high-end Swiss/Luxury aesthetic.
The Hero section must use the provided dark marble background image with a gradient overlay to ensure the text meets APCA contrast standards.
Use framer-motion for subtle fade-in-up animations when scrolling down the page. Stagger the bento grid items.
For the Contact Us form, implement it visually on the frontend using Shadcn UI principles but customized with our dark taupe styles. No backend is required, just UI.
Ensure the navigation header is sticky with glassmorphism over the hero section.
